title: A Strange Planet with a Mysterious Atmosphere
summary: Scientists have discovered a weird planet called TOI-5205 b using the James Webb Space Telescope. This planet is as big as Jupiter but orbits a tiny star. When it passes in front of its star, it blocks some light, letting astronomers study its atmosphere. They found that the planet's air has fewer heavy elements than expected, which is surprising because planets usually have more heavy stuff. This makes it a 'forbidden' planet that doesn't fit current ideas about how planets form. The atmosphere also has gases like methane and hydrogen sulfide. Researchers think the heavy elements might be hidden deep inside the planet. This discovery helps us learn more about how giant planets grow around small stars.

keywords.explanation: a large object in space that orbits a star
the layer of gases around a planet
a bright object in space like the Sun
materials like metals that are heavier than hydrogen
a powerful telescope in space used to study planets
something that doesn't follow the usual rules

options: It doesn't fit current planet ideas
questions.correct_answer: It doesn't fit current planet ideas

background_read: Planets are big objects that go around stars. Our solar system has planets like Earth and Jupiter. Scientists use telescopes to study planets far away. Sometimes they find planets that are unusual and help us understand how planets are made. This article talks about a special planet that surprises scientists.
Article_Structure: WHO: Scientists using the James Webb Space Telescope
WHAT: Discovered a planet with a strange atmosphere that has fewer heavy elements
WHERE: In space, orbiting a small star
WHY: To learn how giant planets form and why this one doesn't follow the rules

perspectives.description: Scientists are excited to find a planet that challenges what we know about planet formation.
